allow: PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { $g.Source; gh auth status } else { "gh not found" })

PowerShell(git config --global credential.helper; "---"; "url=https://github.com`n" | git credential fill 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'username|password' -SimpleMatch | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '='\)[0] })
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Initial commit: Design Studio Compass v1 *)
